Gets the IP Address of the computer

Assigns a player's sprite based on their player's string colour.

K

keyPressed(KeyEvent) - Method in class GameModel
Invoked when a key is pressed, initiating player movement.
keyReleased(KeyEvent) - Method in class GameModel
Invoked when a key is released, which halts player movement.
keyTyped(KeyEvent) - Method in class GameModel
Required by KeyListener interface.

L

loadImage(String) - Method in class GameView
Locates and reads image files.
loadMap(String) - Method in class GameModel
Reads a CSV file to create a 2D map grid array.

P

paintComponent(Graphics) - Method in class GameView
Automatically triggered on repaint requests to paint backgrounds, graphics, maps, and players.

readText() - Method in class SuperSocketMaster
Reads the text that was recieved from the open socket

Sends text over the open socket
